user.title: RS510 inverter
user.description:
Connect to an RSPro RS510 / TECO L510 inverter via Modbus RTU.

Prerequisites (set once on the inverter keypad):
- P00-02 = 2  (run source: communication)
- P00-05 = 5  (frequency source: communication)

data_description.serial_port: Path to the RS485 adapter, e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0 or /dev/ttyACM0
data_description.min_frequency: Corresponds to 0 % fan speed (P00-13 on the inverter)
data_description.max_frequency: Corresponds to 100 % fan speed (P00-12, factory default: 50 Hz)
data_description.poll_interval: How often Home Assistant reads the inverter status

error.cannot_connect: Cannot open serial port. Check cable and port path.
error.cannot_read: Connected to port, but inverter did not respond. Check slave address, baud rate and wiring.
error.freq_range_invalid: Minimum frequency must be less than maximum frequency.

data_description.poll_interval: How often Home Assistant reads the inverter status

error.freq_range_invalid: Minimum frequency must be less than maximum frequency.
